name: trips
description: Per-trip ecosystem under spice/trips/<slug>/. Each trip is a flat folder with an atlas note + 5 baseline sections (Flights, Stay, Packing List, To Do, Notes). Hub at spice/trips/Trips.md lists trips as BeaconCards row-layout cards sorted upcoming-first. 'New Trip' button scaffolds the directory tree from a name + dates + location dialog. Per-trip nav buttons auto-discover sibling sections. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.58.0 FA-6): canonical-vocab adoption per Frontmatter Alignment workstream. Trip Atlas + Trip Board Card templates emit canonical created_at: (ISO+TZ; replaces legacy created:). Trip Atlas attending: renamed to canonical people: (plural wikilink list per canonical narrowing — entity-people is the cross-blueprint canonical key; trips' attending was the legacy semantic narrowing). Discriminator tag trip stripped from Trip Atlas template (functional kanban-card / trip-card / trips-hub tags retained). Trip Board Card temporal date tag stripped. TripNavButtons helper emits ISO+TZ created_at via NEW _isoWithTz method (replaces legacy YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm dateStr). 2 existing rule_fragments declare extends: _canonical-vocab; Trip Atlas rule drops attending requirement + adds optional people requirement + drops trip required_tag.

post_install.message: Trips blueprint v0.1.0 installed at spice/trips/. Open spice/trips/Trips.md and click 'New Trip' to scaffold your first trip. Each trip lives at spice/trips/<slug>/ with an atlas + 5 section notes; per-trip nav buttons auto-discover sibling sections so user-added files get nav coverage automatically. Cmd+R required after this install to load TripsHubCards + TripNavButtons CustomJS classes.
